channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 2.9%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What Wes Streeting said in his resignation letter – and what he meant

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What to know about contenders who could replace Keir Starmer as Britain's Labour leader

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race
item.description: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham under pressure to identify seat for Westminster return
item.description: Burnham under pressure to identify seat for Westminster return

item.title: BBC Politics: Could you recognise Wales' new first minister?
item.description: Could you recognise Wales' new first minister?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown
item.description: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Its very funny how they pretend to be impartial but this quite clearly is just them being upset about things you have said about their emotional support Prime Minister.
item.description: Its very funny how they pretend to be impartial but this quite clearly is just them being upset about things you have said about their emotional support Prime Minister.

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting resigns and criticises government's 'drift'
ITVX: Andy Burnham 'must be allowed to stand' for parliament, Labour MP argues | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham 'must be allowed to stand' for parliament, Labour MP argues | ITV News - ITVX
